<function=python>
<parameter=code>
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

# Check white dot position
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White dot: {n['boundary']} (was [27,21], moved by {n['boundary'][0][0]-27} rows)")

# Check yellow cross arms
print("Yellow cross arms:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] == 11:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check yellow targets
print("Yellow targets:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        print(f"  at {n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
